race.comment: LISTENTOYOURHEART (4) drops back in trip having managed to keep on when stepping up in journey at Kelso last month. Will be seen to much better effect over this distance and is the one to beat. FAVOUR AND FORTUNE (1) returned to form finishing third behind the same winner for the second year in a row at Aintree two weeks ago. One worth keeping on side. GNOMON (10) finally got off the mark in a maiden hurdle at Ascot four weeks ago. May play a role on handicap debut. FASOL (9) has run some mighty races in big field contests this season. Olive Nicholls does well with this seven year old. Respect.
